properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v5 v10 v11 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: If you believe You can move the highest mountains, Cross the greatest oceans And walk across the water, the water.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You feel defeated, Falling on your knees, and Looking up for some hope tonight.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You try to stand up, But you throw your hands up, Like you no longer have the strength to fight.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Cause you've seen too many sunsets, Too many days ending in the darkest night But, on your own, You'll never know You'll never know.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: If you believe You can move the highest mountains Cross the greatest oceans Walk across the water, the water.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Believe you can move the highest mountains Cross the greatest oceans Walk across the water If you believe

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: They say that all you need is faith, But it's almost like you lost your way.

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Took a few wrong turns, Took a few breaks, Falling behind now, Looking for grace.

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Cause you need someone to lift you up, Yeah, make right all the things you've done Cause on your own, You'll never know You'll never know.

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Believe you can move the highest mountains Cross the greatest oceans Walk across the water If you believe If you believe, yeah

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: You can do anything You can do anything You can do anything If you believe
